info_dialog.victory_condition: The first player to reach the opposite side wins.
info_dialog.turn_choice: On your turn, choose one of the following two actions.
info_dialog.move_piece_details:
- Move 1 square in any direction (up, down, left, or right), but you cannot move if blocked by a wall.

- If your piece is next to the opponent's piece in the direction you wish to move, you can jump over their piece and continue forward.

- If your piece is next to the opponent's piece and there is a wall behind the opponent, you can move diagonally.
info_dialog.place_wall_details: (However, you must not completely block the opponent's path to reach the opposite side, such as trapping them with walls.)
info_dialog.manual_item_1: 1. White is the first player, and Black is the second player.
info_dialog.manual_item_2: 2. The bottom side is your side, and the top side is the opponent's side.
info_dialog.manual_item_3: 3. Your remaining walls are displayed at the bottom.
info_dialog.manual_item_4: 4. The opponent's remaining walls are displayed at the top.
info_dialog.manual_item_5: 5. Click the arrow to move your piece.
info_dialog.manual_item_6: 6. Dragging the board area horizontally or vertically will place a translucent wall in that area.
info_dialog.manual_item_7: 7. When a translucent wall is placed, player movement and dragging are disabled.
info_dialog.manual_item_8: 8. The translucent wall disappears when clicking on another area of the board.
info_dialog.manual_item_9: 9. Clicking the translucent wall again will place an actual wall.

net_err.title: Network Error
net_err.content: No network connection detected. Please connect and try again.
